pages.text: This section exists to answer the most common player question in Oathbound Relics: $(thing)"What does that actually mean?"$()$(br2)If a tooltip uses a named state such as $(item)Laziness$(), $(item)Judged$(), $(item)Impact$(), $(item)Heat$(), or $(item)Hollow Dominion$(), look it up here for a plain-English explanation.

Not every term in this category is a separate potion effect. Some are $(thing)custom meters$(), $(thing)weapon states$(), or $(thing)player-facing names$() for a group of buffs and debuffs. When that is the case, the entry will say so directly.
